summary: Unified /login page (3 sign-in methods + collapsed Demo logins) fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest pass — OTP request 200 with demo_otp=123456 for 10-digit phone, 400 for short numbers; OTP verify returns faculty (role=staff) for 9876500010+123456, falls back to primary student for unknown 10-digit numbers, returns 401 for wrong code; Microsoft mock SSO returns token+user (student@mahindrauniversity.edu.in) and /auth/me works with that token; all 8 demo password accounts (student, student2, faculty, librarian, warden, security, exam, admin) still log in via /api/auth/login. Frontend (mobile 375x800): Password method (method-password + email-input + password-input + login-button) logs in faculty and lands on /(tabs); OTP method (method-otp -> phone-input -> send-otp-button -> otp-input -> verify-otp-button) with 9876500010+123456 lands on /(tabs); Microsoft button (microsoft-button) signs in and lands on /(tabs); Demo logins collapsible (demo-toggle expands demo-accounts, demo-go-admin@mahindrauniversity.edu.in one-tap login works); logout from profile (logout-btn -> logout-confirm modal) returns to /login; admin logout via top-right user pill (admin-signout) from /admin returns to /login. No role-select screen — app opens directly at /login. Deprecated packages detected: none new. RN-Web deprecation warnings persist (shadow*, props.pointerEvents) — carryover from iteration_2.

issues: OTP input has placeholder ------ which renders as a long dashed line; consider showing 6 individual underscores or a real 6-cell OTP UI for better UX. Minor.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings persist: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Same as iteration_1/2 — unresolved. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts:134-208 (clay.* recipes still use shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius).

action_items: [LOW / carryover] Replace shadow* props with boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (clay.* recipes) and move pointerEvents into style to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
[LOW / nit] OTP screen placeholder '------' renders as one long dashed line; consider a 6-cell OTP input for clearer UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/auth/otp/* and /api/auth/microsoft are CLEARLY MARKED as mock flows (DEMO_OTP=123456, MICROSOFT_DEMO_EMAIL=student@mahindrauniversity.edu.in). The mock OTP is surfaced in the API response as `demo_otp` — fine for demo, but in a real deployment that field MUST be removed.
OTP verify falls back to primary student for unknown 10-digit numbers (server.py:432-436). Acceptable for demo per the PRD; if/when real SMS is added this fallback must be removed.
/app/frontend/src/api.ts uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly with /api prefix — no hardcoded URLs.

Login screen (login.tsx) correctly uses testID on every interactive element (method-password, method-otp, email-input, password-input, login-button, phone-input, send-otp-button, otp-input, verify-otp-button, microsoft-button, demo-toggle, demo-accounts, demo-go-<email>, change-number, resend-otp, toggle-password). Excellent test affordance.
src/auth.tsx exposes both `login(email,password)` and `setSession(token,user)` — the OTP and Microsoft flows correctly use setSession to set token+user from the auth response. Clean separation.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_login_methods.py (created — 14 tests for OTP, Microsoft, password regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (password, OTP, Microsoft, demo one-tap, profile logout -> /login, admin logout -> /login all verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Run regression with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://decoupled-frontend.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Login E2E test selectors confirmed working: [data-testid="method-password|method-otp|email-input|password-input|login-button|phone-input|send-otp-button|otp-input|verify-otp-button|microsoft-button|demo-toggle|demo-accounts|demo-go-<email>|toggle-password|change-number|resend-otp"]. Profile logout flow uses [data-testid="logout-btn"] -> modal [data-testid="logout-confirm"]. Admin shell uses [data-testid="admin-signout"] (the user pill in the top-right of /admin). The 'logout-variant' string in /app/frontend/app/admin/index.tsx:103 is a MaterialCommunityIcon name on the Checked Out KPI card — not a logout button.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs reproduced this iteration.
